sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91789" key="puro/mantis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρό-μαντις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, and <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <sense id="n91789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fire-diviner</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τυρ-</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.69</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
